image:image.image:title: Isaac Seiler
image:image.image:caption: Primary image for Isaac Seiler, Fulbright Scholar, Truman Scholar, and OpenAI ChatGPT Lab member.

image:image.image:title: Fulbright Taiwan ChatGPT Lab with OpenAI Support
image:image.image:caption: Isaac Seiler founded and led an OpenAI-supported Fulbright Taiwan ChatGPT Lab for educators.

image:image.image:title: Artificial Intelligence in State Government Index
image:image.image:caption: A public benchmark measuring generative AI adoption across U.S. states and territories.

image:image.image:title: Congressional Office Setup and 100 Day Report
image:image.image:caption: Systems, staffing, communications, and metrics used to launch a new congressional office.

image:image.image:title: AI Platforms and Journalism Research
image:image.image:caption: Honors research on AI, digital platforms, local journalism, democracy, and media policy.

image:image.image:title: Electric Vehicle Charging Access Analysis
image:image.image:caption: GIS analysis of electric vehicle charging access, infrastructure, and transportation equity.

image:image.image:title: Education Conference Presentation on AI Applications
image:image.image:caption: A conference-style educator workshop by Isaac Seiler translating AI, LLMs, prompt design, classroom use cases, and verification habits into practical teaching workflows.

image:image.image:title: Boehringer Cares Foundation Rebrand and Strategy Shift
image:image.image:caption: A full rebrand and strategic redirect for Boehringer Cares, spanning narrative, UX, visual identity, and internal communications.

image:image.image:title: Communications Consultancy and Supporting Local Candidates
image:image.image:caption: An independent consultancy effort supporting local candidates through campaign websites, digital strategy, and rapid-response communications.

image:image.image:title: Political Reporting at WashU
image:image.image:caption: Student political reporting at WashU focused on protest, campus governance, elections, and institutional accountability.

image:image.image:title: The 2022 Institute for Nonprofit News Index Survey
image:image.image:caption: A large-scale nonprofit news research project involving data collection, survey synthesis, and direct stakeholder outreach.

image:image.image:title: Sustainable Development and Health Access Report
image:image.image:caption: Strategy and communications work around health access policy at Boehringer Ingelheim, including an internal report and SDX partnership support.

image:image.image:title: Raised $20k for Local St. Louis Organizations
image:image.image:caption: A student-led philanthropy process by Isaac Seiler's WashU team evaluating and supporting St. Louis immigrant and refugee-serving nonprofits.

image:image.image:title: Exclusive Interview with High-Visibility Congressperson
image:image.image:caption: Early access-driven political reporting on then-Congressman Peter Meijer during a volatile post-impeachment period.

image:image.image:title: First Personal Website
image:image.image:caption: Isaac Seiler's first hand-built personal portfolio project, created to learn Git, frontend development, content modeling, databases, and deployment.
